query:
-- Find Mega Electrics customer
SELECT id, externalId, name, businessName, billingPlatforms, serviceCount, monthlyCost, notes
FROM customers WHERE name LIKE '%Mega%' OR name LIKE '%Electric%';

-- Check what Xero billing tables exist
SELECT TABLE_NAME FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.TABLES 
WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE() AND TABLE_NAME LIKE '%xero%' OR TABLE_NAME LIKE '%billing%' OR TABLE_NAME LIKE '%invoice%' OR TABLE_NAME LIKE '%revenue%'
ORDER BY TABLE_NAME;
